Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal

Class AbstractUserManagementItem

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal.AbstractUserManagementItem
All Implemented Interfaces:

Direct Known Subclasses:

public abstract class AbstractUserManagementItem extends Object implements UserManagementItem
